programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby must beat a bounty hunter to an escaped convict who can vindicate a prison trustee charged with murder.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Dan Mathews finds a trigger-happy madman holding a terrified family at gunpoint.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Martin Milner and Kent McCord appear as Officers Malloy and Reed to portray the policeman's role in society.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.sub-title: Log 65 -- Cigarettes, Cars And Wild, Wild Women
programme.desc: Reed and Malloy help take down a chop-shop that employs cute girls in mini-skirts to steal cars from trusting men. They also arrest a young man who grows pot and holds parties in the home of his unsuspecting shut-in aunt.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: After responding to a gas leak in a home, reed and malloy search for a missing child. Finally, they investigate an attempted car theft that ended with a fatal shooting.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony head to the tropical paradise of Hawaii as part of their Trekkin' all 50 tour."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver and Wally make friends with the garbage man's kids, Chris and Pete. They quickly learn that they take for granted what they have. Simple things like just having a yard to play in leave Chris and Pete in awe.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally, Chester and Tooey are building their own boat and plan to sail on it, despite Ward and June's forbidding Wally. Once at the lake, Beaver is the only one small enough to get in it and once on the water, the boat tips over leaving a soaked Beaver behind. However, it's trying to keep their afternoon of boating a secret from Ward and June, that's really going to wipe Wally and Beaver out.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Calendar Girl
programme.desc: A building contractor is charged with the murder of a wealthy political Mr. fix-it.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock defends a Vietnamese fisherman and his son when they are accused of murdering a racist fisherman. And It isn't just the fishermen that Matlock ends up defending, as he, too, becomes a target of the racist townspeople.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Sweet is heartbroken when an elderly woman who befriended him is murdered in her bookstore.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Soldiers practice war at Drusilla's pond

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: After a bank teller foils a robbery, he steals money from the bank for himself.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When Adam is ambushed by an escaped convict who forces him to swap clothes, it isn't long before a posse is on Adam's trail. To make matters worse, the posse leader knows it is Adam, but wants to see him hang just the same.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds gold on their property, a fast-talking salesman who tried to sell Lucas a new lightning rod offers instead to buy the ranch's mineral rights.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Micah is badly injured by an escaping prisoner, Lucas tracks the prisoner back to his home town.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: When an esteemed member of the wagon train is found dead, Adams needs to prevent mob rule and make sure a lawful trial takes place. The accused is not well liked and found passed out with the rifle used in the murder. But is he the killer?

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: John delivers a cyanotic baby. The firemen give Roy a bad time about his cooking. A boy gets his hand stuck in a vase; John rescues a kid in handcuffs. A man repairing a washer gets an electric shock. The paramedics rescue a man trapped on a crane.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: After hearing that North Korean prisoners have been released in the area, everyone is upset when Margaret disappears. Colonel Flagg is called in to investigate, and bungles things in his usual manner.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Sidney Freedman, feeling depressed, visits the 4077th to observe how they fare under the pressures of war. He begins a letter to Sigmund Freud as a form of self-therapy, and releases his tension in the form of a practical joke with B.J., aimed at Frank Burns.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: After Frank discovers that Danny Fitzsimmons has shot himself to get out of combat, Father Mulcahy is called in. Realizing his lack of understanding of the fighting, Mulcahy accompanies Radar to an aid station, where they encounter the real war at first hand. Mulcahy performs an emergency tracheotomy, guided by Hawkeye over the radio.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: When Dr. Syn Paik, a North Korean surgeon, arrives with some wounded, he is passed off as a South Korean by Hawkeye and B.J., but to no avail. Hot Lips and Frank try to convince Potter that Paik is a spy. Paik, Hawkeye and B.J. agree that it would be in the interest of all for him to leave.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney, on a spree of destroying illegal stills, are surprised when a trail leads them to two spinster sisters.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy counsels a Mayberry couple who are constantly bickering with each other.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After Granny takes a cab home and gets charged for the ride, she decides that it is time for her to learn how to drive. The taxi driver who took Granny home is having trouble collecting the fair, and after a series of events begins to believe that he is in a mental hospital. Granny, during her driving lesson, mistakenly gets on the road.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The Douglases try to determine which of their hens is laying square eggs. Once word gets out, Haney and a chicken breeder both want in on the action. Oddly, the cube-shaped eggs don't worry Oliver nearly as much as their toaster that operates when you say the number "five".

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan uses a broken water main under the camp to aid the escape of captured resistance fighters by creating a health spa.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: A Klink, A Bomb And A Short Fuse
programme.desc: General Burkhalter wants Hogan to defuse a bomb that has landed in camp.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Chita Rivera And Bob Newhart (part 2)
programme.desc: "Guests Chita Rivera and Bob Newhart. Originally aired on 02/22/71."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Mischievous Doll
programme.desc: When a shady private investigator and his pawn die mysteriously, the woman who may have been his intended target is charged with their murders.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A singer searches for an authentic folk song.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: With the intention of marrying another woman, a man uses a badly decomposed body to frame his wife for his murder. When the newly betrothed woman's mother learns of the scheme, however, she fears that she may be her son-in-law's next target.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Ellen Gray hires Mannix because she believes she has been stalked by a Vietnamese man ever since the death of her husband in Hong Kong.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Cannon is called in to investigate police corruption by the mayor of a Midwestern town."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby's search for a 6-year-old boy leads him to the boy's father - a vagrant who deals in illegal arms.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: With a man-hunting gunman on the loose, Dan Mathews springs a manhunt of his own

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A conference provokes old-line policemen to reassess their attitudes, particularly toward minority groups.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: "The officers investigate robberies, attempted arson and a violent argument."

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Officer Malloy pays tribute to Officer Tom Porter, who has recently fallen in the line of duty. Malloy recounts the close friendship they developed while training at the academy, as well as the moments where they crossed paths on duty, including the night of the officer's unfortunate demise.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony run into a few almost identical faces at a cartoon curation fan convention."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Larry and Beaver find themselves tardy for the third time this week and decide to skip altogether. However, they quickly find themselves caught when they accidentally walk on the set of a live TV show.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: A lazy weekend leads Ward to direct Wally and Beaver to read a book, Tom Sawyer. The book influences them so much that they take on the job of painting the garage doors. However, they soon find the job to be awfully boring and messy. Chaos erupts when neighbor Bengie Bellamy stops by wanting to help.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Petulant Partner
programme.desc: Harry Bright and Chuck Clark were once best friends and business partners until Margaret entered the picture. Margaret was a much younger woman on the make who entranced Chuck into marrying her. When Margaret is found shot to death, Harry is arrested for murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a troubled young woman is accused of murder, her late father's former business partner hires Matlock to prove her innocence.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil's dream of a better relationship with his Aunt Ruda and her son is shattered when his cousin takes part in a string of burglaries that result in murder.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Jim-Bob meets a boy who is on his way to join the Air Corps, but the boy never actually leaves

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt must rescue a teenage girl from indians and bring her back to her family.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Raised in the hills by her reclusive grandfather, Trudy is left in Joe's care when he dies. Honoring a promise to the girl's late grandfather, Joe is determined to transform the hoydenish Trudy into a "lady."

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When an outlaw leader lures Marshal Torrance out of town, Lucas is the only one who can stop him from lynching a local man who killed one of the members of his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former army captain comes to North Fork to kill the man who shot down his son in a gunfight—Lucas McCain.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: When the deceased's wife arrives, the people on the wagon train learn that the murdered man has a dark past, and this could be a case of Cain and Abel—or perhaps someone in the dead-man's past came home-to-roost.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Station 51 is called to fight a wildfire. John and Roy rescue an elderly woman and her sister, treat an injured fireman, deliver a baby, catch a looter and find a boy's lost dog.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: After 24 hours of surgery, Hawkeye and Potter venture off to a Korean hospital to lend a hand. Hawkeye is appalled to learn that he must carry a gun. After helping the Koreans, they are shelled on the way back. They scramble from the jeep before it is shelled, and Potter urges Hawkeye to shoot in self-defense, against Hawkeye's will, and he does—into the air.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: While Colonel Potter goes to Tokyo on R&R, his horse develops colic. Klinger becomes chronically depressed, and Hot Lips gets appendicitis. The horse is flushed out with a hose, Hawkeye and B.J. perform an appendectomy on Hot Lips, and all are well when Potter returns, except Klinger. Potter offers Klinger a discharge for severe depression, and Klinger gets very excited, which loses him the discharge.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: After Potter orders Radar to move a Korean spirit post believed to ward off evil spirits, things mysteriously begin to go wrong. When an old Korean man is brought into camp for medical attention, he refuses surgery unless the spirits in the camp are exorcised. A priestess is brought in, who exhibits her dance and her bells and chants. All is well, and Radar returns the spirit post to its original position.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: After Hawkeye bemoans the young age of the wounded, he appears to develop problems. Sleepwalking and bad dreams, according to Sidney Freedman, are taking Hawkeye back to a simple time, but the horrors of war continue to intrude. After Sidney's assurances that he is as sane as can be, Hawkeye's life once again seems to settle down.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy becomes suspicious when a record promoter comes to town to gather material for a folk music album.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney's overzealous policing enrages the people of Mayberry.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts, Drysdale and Jane are heading to their castle in England. Their plane ride isn’t the easiest, especially for Drysdale and another passenger. Jethro smuggles Elly’s turkey, buzzard, on board, and Drysdale is attacked by it in the bathroom, as well as another man who has the misfortune of being seated near the clan.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.sub-title: Never Trust A Little Old Lady
programme.desc: It's tomato planting season and Oliver needs some useful weather information. Hooterville relies on WPIXL-TV's Mildred, a little old lady who prances out of her dollhouse, or Walter, the singing weatherman. Both are constantly wrong so Oliver contacts the Weather Bureau which predicts warm days and nights. With the plants in the ground, Hooterville suffers the coldest night of the year. Incredibly, it's Lisa's crepe suzettes that save the crop from the cold.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan is ordered to photograph and destroy a model for a radio-controlled tank that is being tested at camp.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Will The Real Adolf Please Stand Up?
programme.desc: With camp security raised, Hogan and his men are desperate to smuggle top-secret German fortifications information to the Allies. The solution? Make liberal use of Carter's remarkable impersonation of Adolf Hitler.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, And Karen Wyman
programme.desc: "Guests Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, and Karen Wyman. Originally aired on 03/01/71."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Laughing Lady
programme.desc: A woman being held in prison pending her trial sees the woman whom she believes committed the crime with which she has been charged on a televised gala.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Two people in a remote cabin find signs of an extraterrestrial.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.sub-title: The Return Of Verge Likens (s3, ep)
programme.desc: A country farmer plans vengeance on his father's murderer.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix uncovers a mysterious world that surrounded the late husband of his client, Amanda Hewitt.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "After witnessing a murder, a woman flees to a sanitarium where she was once a patient. It's up to Cannon to find her and keep her safe."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A pair of amateur thieves attempt to cover up the death of their cohort during a holdup - at the risk of the diamonds they've stolen.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Lazy Uncle Joe, who fancies himself a human dynamo, announces his retirement.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The Hooterville folks are faced with a larcenous fundraiser when they try to find enough money to buy the church a new organ.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is glued to the television set the Clampetts received for Christmas, especially because of one TV Western star, Quirt Manly. She really wants to meet him, and Drysdale arranges for it to happen. And Granny already has him set up for Elly May, because she knows he is probably the only who can tame the vine-swinging girl. However, when he arrives at the mansion, the Clampetts see he isn’t who they thought he was. Quirt Manly is actually a short actor with a high-pitched voice who doesn’t do any of his own stunts or riding.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: At the mansion, the clan is in need of food because the hunting in Beverly Hills is horrible. They call a catering company, but get mean-mouthed. At the bank, Drysdale gets a call and learns that he got a kangaroo from a friend and it is at his house.

programme.title: Popeye and Pals
programme.sub-title: Morning, Noon And Night Club, Crystal Brawl, The Jeep
programme.desc: "Popeye temporarily drops his nautical air to become a night club dancer, all for Olive's sake., When Bluto takes Olive to the fair, Popeye disguises himself as a fortune teller to get her attention., Popeye and the Jeep, his magical pet, visit Olive and learn Swee'pea has crawled out of his crib and disappeared."

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.sub-title: Purr-chance To Dream, The Prospecting Bear, Smitten Kitten
programme.desc: "Tom isn't sleeping well and keeps having nightmares about getting beat up by a bulldog., Barney Bear goes prospecting for gold with a donkey to help him out., Jerry has flashbacks when he sees Tom interested in a female cat."

programme.title: The Woody Woodpecker Show
programme.sub-title: Ace In The Hole, Chilly And Looney Gooney, Unlucky Potluck, Seal On The Loose, Pixie Picnic, Scrappy Birthday, Wet Blanket Policy
programme.desc: "Woody Woodpecker is a stable boy who longs to fly a plane. But the bulldog sergeant on the airfield stands in his way., Chilly and Gooney the "Gooney Bird" Albatross work together to avoid the hunter Colonel Pot Shot., After he discovers a loose floorboard in the front steps, Charlie tells Junior to fix and paint the steps. Junior paints the back steps as well, thinking it will please Charlie…, Woody tries to hide a pet seal from Miss Meany in her "no pets allowed" boarding house., A group of forest pixies have a picnic., Andy buys a hound to catch a fox and make a fox fur coat for his girlfriend's birthday present., Buzz Buzzard tries to collect on Woody Woodpecker's life insurance policy by any means necessary!"

programme.title: Bugs Bunny and Friends
programme.sub-title: Rabbit Transit, Beep Prepared, Peck Up Your Troubles, The Iceman Ducketh, Cat Feud, Feather Bluster, Rabbit Romeo
programme.desc: "Bugs and Cecil Turtle decide to have their own "tortoise and the hare" race. , Wile E. Coyote chases the Road runner in this classic., Sylvester tries everything he can to catch a woodpecker. , At a trading post in the Klondike, Daffy Duck overhears that they are paying big bucks for furs. He heads north to trap Bugs Bunny and cash in. , Marc Anthony, the ferocious guard dog, falls for a cute cuddly little kitty. An evil cat tries to swipe the kitty and it’s up to Marc Anthony to protect the kitty. , Foghorn and the farm dog have reached old age and are far past their fighting phase, instead they prefer to sit around and play chess. Seeing their kids fight brings them memories of their past that they reminisce of. , Elmer's uncle, Judd, promises him $500 if he will watch his lovesick rabbit, Millicent. When Elmer gets Bugs to come over and keep Millie company, crazy things start happening."

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Ready-made Corpse
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are assigned to guard foreign dictator Colonel Pellargo, but they are foiled by a clever assassin, who also turns up dead.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: After an argument with Major Adams, Flint leaves the wagon train and cozies up to a bar at a nearby town. What he doesn't know is the locals are shanghaiing strangers for slave labor in a mine and no one on the train knows where he went.

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Victoria starts brooding about how Tom could truly love her if he was unfaithful and fathered a bastard child. She journeys to Heath’s hometown to try to find the truth about Tom’s relationship with Heath’s mother.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A friend of Newly's is the victim of a con game.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Susan Blanchard is injured in a wagon crash. Though there is nothing physically wrong with her, Susan is psychosomatically incapable of leaving her bed. Enter faith healer Garth, who promises to make Susan walk again.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new store owner upsets the town by demanding that all credit accounts be paid off.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The widow of a bandit killed by Lucas plots a grotesque revenge.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: In Cottonwood, at the Pair-A-Dice Saloon, Qunice gets into a fight with Major Courtney. Jim swears he'll kill him.

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin finds a sick old man and his son trying to protect their mine from claim jumpers. The old man is delirious and thinks that Paladin is the devil and has only offered to help in exchange for their souls.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When phony wanted posters put a price on the head of a retired Confederate officer, Colonel Sykes summons Josh Randall to help keep the bounty hunters at bay while also uncovering the person behind the bogus posters.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: Hula-la-la, Self Made Maids, Studio Stoops, Three Arabian Nuts, Quiz Whizz, Slap Happy Sleuths
programme.desc: "The boys run into trouble with the local witch doctor who wants to add their heads to his collection., The Stooges are artists who want to marry their models; "Moella", "Larraine", and "Shempetta". The girls' father doesn't approve, so the Stooges tickle him into submission. , The Stooges are investigators for the Onion Oil Company. The company's service stations are being robbed by a gang of crooks, so the boys pose as gas station attendants to capture the bad guys. , The Stooges are hired by a movie studio as publicity men. Their first assignment is to get publicity for Dolly Devore, a pretty starlet. They fake a kidnapping, but the cops won't believe their story. Then the girl is really kidnapped and the Stooges must come to the rescue. Shemp winds up hanging out a tenth story window on an extending telephone. , The Stooges find themselves in the crosshairs of thieves who want a magic lamp., Joe wins a contest and is promptly fleeced out of his winnings by some con men. When the Stooges go to recover his money, the bad guys convince them that they can get rich by posing as children and becoming the wards of a millionaire. The boys go along with the plan, not realizing that the "millionaire" and his pretty niece are in on the scam and are planning to knock them off. The Stooges foil the plan and recover Joe's money. "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "A timid typesetter who longs to be a reporter hopes to land a big story by spending a night in a haunted house."

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "Invisible atomic monsters attack a U.S. Armed Forces base and the local residents."

programme.title: Svengoolie Uncrypted
programme.desc: "After 43 years in his warm and cozy dungeon, master horror host, Svengoolie leaves on an epic journey filled with celebrity encounters; long lost archives; a search for lost memorabilia and a celebration that could only take place in Berwyn, Illinois."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: While aboard a commercial aircraft, a man believes he is seeing a gremlin on its wing.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is displeased when his wife buys an expensive doll for his step-daughter. He becomes even more displeased when the doll tells him it doesn't like him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: The Monsters Are Due On Maple Street
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bandaged young woman awaits the outcome of an experimental treatment that has been administered to her in a last-ditch effort to make her appear normal.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A woman is shocked to learn that the floor of a department store on which she bought a gold thimble doesn't exist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A lonely old woman refuses to leave her apartment for fear of meeting "Mr. Death."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The Kanamits, nine-foot-tall aliens, arrive on Earth with one lofty goal: To Serve Man.

programme.title: The Powers of Matthew Star
programme.desc: "Matt develops a new power and is tasked with protecting a diplomat's daughter."

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: A favorite graduate dies and leaves $10,000 in his will to Bayside, creating a battle of the sexes at the school as both feel they deserve the endowment.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: A famous film star comes to Bayside to shoot an anti-drug PSA. The gang is enamored with him but then they discover that he uses drugs himself.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: If Zack can just get out of detention, he has a chance at winning a trip to Hawaii. Doing their best to get him off the hook, the gang ends up in detention, too.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, the gang flashes back to the romantic adventures they've had in the past.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Slater and his father fight over where he should attend college and Zack tries to fix it. Meanwhile, Jessie becomes a cheerleader and worries about college acceptances.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: After Zack buys class rings for all the seniors at Bayside, he's embarrassed to find out he's been had when the rings turn out to be phonies.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan competes in a popularity contest at school. With Peter as her campaign manager and the rest of the family pitching in, she's got a great chance of winning - if she can stop making promises to her classmates that she can't possibly keep.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The Brady's friends, the Kellys, adopt three boys, all of different ethnic backgrounds, and soon find themselves dealing with racist neighbors.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: The guys and their girls go on a camping trip for their spring vacation. Under Richie's leadership, however, everything seems to go wrong and nobody has a good time.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: When Laverne and Shirley unwittingly double-date with two criminals intent on robbing the bank next to the Pizza Bowl, the girls find themselves being held as hostages.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: An infamous con artist, held temporarily in Mayberry, manages to enchant everyone except Andy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy gets mixed up with a jewel thief on a cross-country rail trip that marks the end of the series' Hollywood sojourn. That's not the only reason it's a bumpy ride—Lucy keeps pulling the emergency-brake cord!

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver learns he has to go to the dentist and that's when his friends tell him some horror stories about the drill the dentist is going to use. This prompts Beaver to become downright scared of going to the dentist.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally wins a trophy at school and Beaver accidentally breaks it. This leads Ward to accuse Beaver of being jealous of Wally and that he broke it on purpose. Upset, Beaver decides to get new parents and heads to an adoption agency.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Lafe Crick arrives with his daughter, Essiebelle. He found love letters Jethro wrote to his daughter, a beauty contest winner. He plans to get Jethro and Essiebelle married so he can get his paws in the Clampett fortune.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Lafe Crick returns to the Clampett mansion looking to get rich off Jed's money. He tries to get a job at the bank guarding Jed's money, only to get a few million dollars. But Granny has her doubts about the freeloader, though he seems to be proving her wrong.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: A radio bulletin states that the minister who married the Howell's was a fraud.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: A huge meteor lands on the island, causing everything nearby to age very rapidly.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Naomi's feud with Mama lands the two in court when Mama breaks Naomi's vacuum cleaner. The judge has an impossible time keeping order and holds both parties in contempt.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: The family can't understand why Mama dislikes celebrating her birthday. Helping her clean out the attic later that day, Buzz finally pries the story out of her.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.sub-title: The Eyes Of Love / Masquerade / Hollywood Royalty (part 1)
programme.desc: "Part 1. Thieves eye a honeymooning actress's gems; a man encounters his blind childhood love; a wife meets her spouse's mistress."

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy tries to help Barney express his lovestruck feelings for Thelma Lou.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.desc: "Classic Halloween mask collector Rudy Munis has one of the most pristine mask collections known. Costume expert Mark Short value's Rudy's collection and brings a master mask mold to offer in trade."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: It's Halloween at the 4077th, and the staff dons costumes and trades ghost stories. Father Mulcahy discovers a soldier alive that had been pronounced dead.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Radar gets accepted into the "Famous Las Vegas Writers School," and begins to write his impressions of the camp. It happens to be Frank's birthday, so Hawkeye and B.J. stage a fight with each other to make Frank happy.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie's self-esteem takes a beating when he loses his job on the loading dock.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: A college grad threatens to commit suicide after he loses a jaintor's job to Archie.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie's trip to the hospital is an ethnic nightmare. He's admitted by a Puerto Rican receptionist, treated by a Jewish physician, and is forced to accept a blood transfusion from a black doctor.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie recuperates in record time after he's called back to work-with a raise and a promotion.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Shani Wallis And Tim Conway
programme.desc: "Guests Shani Wallis and Tim Conway. Originally aired on 04/29/68."

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Carol and Sis, Carol suspects her sister is pregnant and tries to figure out who the father is. Then, in George and Zelda, Carol sabotages a poker game on a riverboat. Finally, in Salute to Horror Movies, the gang parodies classic films, including "The Mummy", "The Wolf Man", and "The Bride of Frankenstein".

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.sub-title: It May Look Like A Walnut!
programme.desc: Rob falls asleep with a sci-fi movie on and gets visited by an alien from another planet.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob, Laura, Buddy and Sally spend the night in a seemingly haunted cabin.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph cuts a record to sweet talk Alice after insulting her mother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Two unhappy children find a happy escape in a swimming pool.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A couple moves into an isolated seaside residence in a last-ditch effort to save their unstable marriage.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: After getting into a car accident in a rural Kentucky town, Kimble lands in jail by the redneck sheriff who hates outsiders. But Kimble manages to escape with his cellmate Davey "Fatso" Lambert. Hiding out at the Lambert ranch, Kimble sees that Davey's fa

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Skarbeck and Lom are rivals for the vacant post of chief of secret police in the East European Peoples Republic. As they are both hardliners, the IMF must eliminate both of them and make sure Paul Trock becomes the new chief.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Dan Matthews searches for a laboratory worker who exposed himself to radioactive isotopes.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A 91-year-old apartment-house manager gets involved in a murder investigation.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives go to work on several cases connected with the department's business-office division.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A pot-detecting pooch joins the police to stop marijuana smuggling.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and reed hunt down a suspect who has been bombing downtown storefronts. Then they report to a scuffle between two native americans at a bar that the bartender thinks may be a prelude to something a lot more serious.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: In what would prove to be a very busy shift, Malloy and Reed search for a serial arsonist who spawns a copycat, settle a domestic dispute that results from a love triangle, rescue a man who wandered onto the ledge of a high rise and deal with a mentally ill man who is holding his wife at knife-point.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony learn tips and tricks to help them save more money without compromising on the fun."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: June and Ward allow Wally to escort Beaver on a bus headed to a friend's house in Crystal Falls. However, on one of the stops, Beaver inadvertently gets on the wrong bus, a bus that takes him back to Mayfield.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: The Cleavers have new neighbors in the Gates family and Beaver befriends their son, Gilbert Gates (changed to "Bates" in later episodes). However, Ward, June and Wally quickly realize the obvious when Beaver comes home with all kinds of wild stories that Gilbert has told and that Beaver is convinced are true.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Dangerous Dowager
programme.desc: Matilda Benson is a tough old broad who rules her children with an iron hand and the promises in her will. When Benson and her brood become involved in a gambling scandal and the death of a nightclub owner, Mason looks into the matriarch's matter.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When Matlock's new neighbor, Les "Ace" Calhoun (Don Knotts), is charged with murdering the used car salesman who sold him a lemon, Matlock takes the case to prove that more than one person had a motive.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Gillespie receives word that a former Spartan is wanted for the murder of a socialite in Houston. But a ruthless bounty hunter, sent by the victim's jealous husband is already in Sparta and sees the man's sister as a means to locate his quarry.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Olivia becomes emotional (menopausal symptoms) and runs away from home to visit a relative

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: With Matt out helping the Army deliver a gold shipment, Dodge is wide open for Morgan and his men to come in with a Gatlin gun and take over.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When a man comes to town claiming to be Marie's son, Joe is not sure what to think. Could this be his brother, or is it all just a big lie?

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his friend become trapped in an old mine.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark attempt to reform a con man.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Countess Baranof is desperate to get to Alaska to claim her family fortune, and with no horses she applies her considerable charms on Flint. But she's not the one Flint should worry about, as her bodyguard has a more sinister agenda.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Roy talks down a boy in a plane after the pilot (his father) has a heart attack. The paramedics respond to an attempted suicide, an overturned truck and a teenage overdose victim.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Befuddled by a crossword puzzle, Hawkeye persuades his old friend, Tippy Brooks, a whiz at puzzles, to come to camp. Tippy arrives with his commanding officer, Admiral Prescot, thinking it's a medical emergency.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Lieutenant Colonel Harold Beckett lies wounded in post-op waiting to get back to the front for five more days of combat duty to get his promotion. Meanwhile, Cho Lin, the Ping Pong champ, is engaged to Soony. He leaves to get her a ring, when the South Korean army conscripts him. He arrives at the 4077th as a wounded soldier, and after being patched up he is married at the camp.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Billy Tyler, a young black sergeant, is brought into camp with a bullet wound in the leg. He is a football player, and when he discovers that his leg has been amputated, he wants to die. After talks with Radar, Billy agrees that he must live on.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Nurse Carrie Donovan receives a Dear Jane letter from her husband, and practically falls apart. B.J. consoles her, and they spend the night together. Feelings of guilt come over B.J. until he discusses them with Donovan and the air is cleared.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Opie go to great lengths to show Aunt Bee what a mess they'd be without her.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When a handsome new doctor arrives in town, his friendship with Ellie arouses suspicion in Aunt Bee and Barney and jealousy in Andy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed puts up the cabin for Granny's birthday, which Mrs. Drysdale is not happy about. During the celebrating, a sociology student stops by and sees the Clampetts. She thinks they are Drysdale's servants and works to liberate them from what she believes to be a life of servitude.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver spends a lot of time in the principal's office when Lisa enrolls at Hooterville High. In school primarily for a cooking course, she also disrupts history class with her own version of Hungary's past, destroys the womens' showers and explodes a chemistry lab.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Lieutenant Carter enters the camp and Hogan discovers a spy among his men.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The POWs smuggle a tiger tank, about which Klink has been boasting, into camp in order to photograph and study it.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Mike Douglas And Bernadette Peters
programme.desc: "Guests Mike Douglas and Bernadette Peters. Originally aired on 03/08/71."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Fatal Fortune
programme.desc: A fortune teller gives a series of accurate predictions regarding a woman's future. But something goes wrong when she's charged with murdering her new husband.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. What's more, he can't recall his own identity.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: An ex-convict is determined to find burglary loot stashed by his previous cellmate.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix can't recall the events of the past 24 hours—other than a haunting memory of a little girl falling from a balcony.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "A former convict gets Cannon to help him find the man who sent him to jail for no reason."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A nun is accused of taking her terminally ill sister off life support.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A man witnesses the disposal of a body and finds himself in danger.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday's problem: is his temporary partner an aide—or an adversary?

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed start the shift with a call to a liquor store robbery, where a fellow officer was shot but the owner of the store appears to be lying. Further investigation pushes the owner to admit one of the thieves was his brother and he was trying to protect him. In the meantime, they have a zoning issue with an elderly astrology reader followed by the report of a young boy asking a pharmacist questions about Seconal pills.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed and Malloy respond to a car rollover where a good samaritan makes matters worse. Afterward, they respond to several victims of a well-known family of seasonal home improvement con artists before finally catching them in the act. In the meantime, they search for a disgruntled ex-employee who is trying to sabotage his former workplace, and take a drunk driver off the street.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony cook up the idea to open their own restaurant while exploring the tasty past of diners, drive-ins, and drive-thrus."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: While staying after school cleaning the chalkboards, Larry convinces Beaver that Mrs. Rayburn keeps a spanking machine in her office closet. Later, a curious Beaver sneaks a peek but soon finds himself locked in the principal's office. Beaver's fame doesn't go over well with his family, but Beaver has another problem on his hands: he's just gotten his head stuck in an iron fence in the park.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver and Wally get jobs at the circus cleaning the animals and a promise to each be paid $10 dollars at the end of the week. However, the end of the week comes and there is no money in sight; instead, Beaver and Wally become the proud owners of a horse named Nicholas, which they hide in the garage.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Deadly Toy
programme.desc: Martin Selkirk is a major league rotter who wants Claire Allison in the worst way, even though she's dating Dirk Benedict. Selkirk has Dirk's jaw broken and begins sending Claire threatening mail. Then Selkirk is murdered in his beach house.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Anthony Stewart is charged with murdering Michael Russell, the husband of the woman with whom he has been sleeping. Although Stewart, a visiting British ambassador, has diplomatic immunity, he refuses to use it and wants to clean his name.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A bottle of spiked moonshine leads to an accident that claims the life of one teen and blinds another.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: The Waltons have one remaining payment on their mortgage

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Sam takes a special interest in Eric Tabray, who is running around in a gang committing crimes in Dodge.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Wanting to prove his independence and break out of the shadows of his Pa and older brothers, Little Joe sets out to win a lucrative timber contract for the Ponderosa.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas encourages a drunken artist charged with murder to use his talents to identify the true killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark try to persuade a persecuted young mute to return stolen money.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A boy hurt in a crippling accident and his domineering mother meet a runaway boy, who she feels is making her son do things outside his capabilities. Another accident reveals something unexpected because it may pit two friends against each other.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A store owner shoots an armed robber and is filled with remorse. Sparks fly between Johnny and a nurse. Dr. Early treats an alcoholic. A dog delays the rescue of an unconscious woman. Dr. Morton assumes an unconscious hippie is on drugs. The firemen rescue a man trapped at a chemical plant.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Father Mulcahy comes down with infectious hepatitis, and Hawkeye has to give the whole camp antibiotics, while dealing with a psychosomatic back pain. Meanwhile, B.J. has to perform a very difficult operation.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: In the midst of Hawkeye being considered, much to his distaste, for the position of a general's personal physician, Radar becomes a surrogate father to a Korean woman and her baby, until the baby's GI father returns.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: As a cure for the increased tension at the 4077th, Potter obtains a copy of his favorite film, "My Darling Clementine," and makes a social event out of it. As the film continues to break, tensions rise, until Mulcahy plays the piano, Radar does his impersonations and everyone acts out scenes from the film.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Korean children and American soldiers are often badly wounded when they hunt for souvenirs that the enemy have booby-trapped. Potter asks for it to stop, and Hawkeye and B.J. put a local junk dealer out of business.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Mayor Pike (Dick Elliott) and the townspeople are shocked to discover that the last living descendant of Revolutionary War hero Nathan Tibbs is Mayberry's town drunk, Otis Campbell.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A by-the-book courthouse inspector condemns Andy and Barney's lack of proper procedure.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale tries to save the cabin for the Clampetts, but his wife calls a professional home wrecker to tear down the mountain shack. Meanwhile, Ginny Jennings and her sociology professor come back to visit the Clampetts and see that they are still occupying the cabin.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver misunderstands when the Hooterville bigwigs ask him to be a judge. He thinks he's being appointed an appellate judge but they just want him to judge apples at the county fair. The Douglases travel to New York so Oliver can get some judging advice while Lisa shops for a robe and wig for His Honor.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink fails a physical and gets combat duty at the Russian front.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan plans to detour the German bombers that normally attack London to a nearby Allied airbase.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, And David Frost (part 1)
programme.desc: "Guests Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, and David Frost. Originally aired on 03/22/71."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Candy Queen
programme.desc: Claire Armstrong has built a candy empire, but things go sour when her cousin is almost killed by poisoned candy and a man is found dead in his office.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.sub-title: The Life Work Of Juan Diaz (s3, ep)
programme.desc: A dying Mexican frenetically looks for a way to provide for his poor family after his death.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A missing police officer leads Chief Carl Yaring in search of the cop, a former ex-con who was suspected of robbery and murder.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Cannon is hired by a Cuban exile to investigate the death of the man's brother at the hands of law enforcement officials.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Betty falls for a playboy who's planning a murder to gain an inheritance.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A hunting accident leads Dan Matthews to investigate.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A 15-year-old car thief is given a tour of the jail in an attempt to show him the consequences for choosing crime.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Officer Reed loses a robbery suspect while in foot pursuit. Afterward, he and Malloy try to help a priest prevent bloodshed between rival hispanic gangs, and then respond to a battered wife whose husband is very familiar to the officers.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed drive up on a convenience store robbery in progress, which results in the suspects taking hostages. Later, they pull over a reckless driver who has just committed a heinous crime, learn about a new computer system designed to help them be more productive and finally thwart a group of serial burglars who use motorcycles.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Toony and Bill head north to Alaska, the land of bald eagles, northern lights, and... outhouse races?!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver discovers that Ward was in WWII and brags to his classmates that Ward was a war hero. As usual, his classmates don't believe him and Beaver promises to bring in some momentos to prove it. However, at home, Beaver discovers that Ward was an engineer in the war and didn't actually fight in combat, thus leaving Beaver to take drastic measures so as not to look like a fool in front of his classmates.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward makes an offer on a house located in a neighboring town and Beaver believes moving is going to be a sure thing. This leads him to tell all his classmates that he's moving, but when the deal falls through Beaver must tell his class that he won't be moving after all—after they've just thrown him a goodbye party and shoved a handful of presents in his face!

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Spanish Cross
programme.desc: Young Jimmy Morrow can't seem to catch a break. Already on probation for car theft, he's charged with stealing a valuable Spanish cross and killing its owner. Mason feels sorry for the kid and decides to take the case.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: "After Anthony Stewart is nearly killed in a hit and run, Matlock realises that the only way to clear him is to find Shelby Russell, the supposed witness whose claim put Stewart in the hot seat in the first place. He tracks her down via her mother, and tells her that if she doesn't take the stand, her lover will go down for Michael Russell's murder."

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A psychiatrist tells Gillespie that one of her patients has confessed to a crime that another man is about to be executed for, but she refuses to divulge his identity.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Members of Flossie Brimmer's family visit the mountain

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An ex-convict wants revenge against the partner that ran out on him.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Wallowing in self-pity after having gone blind, Matthew Raine begins coming out of his self-imposed exile after befriending Ben's housekeeper, Ann Loring. However, there is someone who doesn't want Matthew to extricate himself from his miserable state.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A lively old lady arrives in town hot on the trail of a notorious bandit—and the reward money for capturing him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A doctor seeks revenge on the man he blames for ruining his practice.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "The wagon train runs into their old pal Swift Cloud who's on his way back to his Native American village after studying medicine in China. However, the aspiring physician faces resentment from both whites and his own people."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: John is envious of the publicity given to another paramedic. After Roy and John rescue a man trapped in ship's rigging, John gets seasick. Dr. Brackett clashes with a tycoon over a diagnosis. The paramedics rescue a horse from a ditch and a child stuck in a well.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: In the midst of a deluge of patients and their individual medical histories, the 4077th is out of blood. Everyone in camp is donating at 48-hour intervals when a truckload of Turkish soldiers arrives to offer their blood and save the day.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Prompted by pressure from Frank, Hot Lips sets a date for marriage with Lieutenant Colonel Donald Penobscott. When Donald arrives in camp for the wedding, a bridal shower and bachelor party are given. When he has passed out drunk, Hawkeye and B.J. place Donald in a body cast and convince him that he has broken his leg.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.sub-title: Fade Out, Fade In: Part 1 (s6, ep)
programme.desc: Radar gets a temporary replacement for Maj. Burns: a Major Charles Emerson Winchester III. Maj. Winchester arrives at the 4077th, only to painfully discover that he's the permanent replacement Frank Burns.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Radar gets a temporary replacement for Maj. Burns: a Major Charles Emerson Winchester III. Maj. Winchester arrives at the 4077th, only to painfully discover that he's the permanent replacement Frank Burns.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie encourages and helps a female farmhand to express her femininity.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Grumpy businessman Ben Weaver insists that Andy foreclose on a down-on-his-luck neighbor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Right after the Clampett's return from London, Granny gets a letter saying she is needed in Hooterville. The problem is that nobody knows where it is. Granny tries to find out, but doesn’t have much luck. Jethro, who isn't getting fed because Granny is focusing on Hooterville, is desperate for food and accidentally eats Elly's grits and rocks for her critters. Granny has to “doctor” him back to health.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.sub-title: It's So Peaceful In The Country
programme.desc: Oliver's mother needs bed rest so what better place than her son's farm. All she has to do is ignore Alf and Ralph's drilling, Haney's tour group, a group of dancing Sioux Indians and their chief who thinks she's a looker.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: After detecting an information leak in the area of Stalag 13, the Germans replace Klink with a more efficient officer, who Hogan sets up to take the fall.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tries to keep a French painting from ending up in Goering's art collection.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, And David Frost (part 2)
programme.desc: "Guests Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, and David Frost. Originally aired on 03/22/71."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Cheating Chancellor
programme.desc: Mason returns to his college alma mater to receive an award, but there's no rest for the weary when he's called upon to defend Van Fowler for the murder of a professor.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A youthful London man heading for a weekend with his married mistress encounters a gentleman with oddly similar plans.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: When attempts are made on the life of Detective Ira Deegan, who is in hot pursuit of a robber, his wife hires Mannix to keep an eye on her husband.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Cannon tries to find a girl who went missing after witnessing a murder."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: The executors of a millionaire's estate attempt to get rid of a new will putting them out of their jobs.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: When a man is exonerated for murder, he goes after the witness who identified him.
